title: aCGH Hybridization and Wash Protocol
author: Hendrik F HFvE Van Essen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.zj3f4qn
materials: Add buffers to dishes and have tin foil covering ready.- Wash a maximum of 5 Agilent slides at the same time. DishMethod BufferTemp (ºC)Time (min) #1 Disassembly Buffer 1 RT - #2 1st wash stepBuffer 1 RT 5(stirrer) #3 2nd wash stepBuffer 2 37 1(stirrer & hot plate) #4 Dry step AcetonitrileRT 1

steps.title: Turn on hybridization oven 65 °C...
steps.instruction: Turn on hybridization oven 65 °C Turn on heat block 95 °C Turn on heat block 37 °C

steps.title: Mix Cy3 and Cy5 samples
steps.instruction: Mix Cy3 and Cy5 samples

steps.title: Mix the following components in 1
steps.instruction: Mix the following components in 1.5 centrifuge tubes * Cy3/Cy5 gDNA mixture 39 µl * Cot-1 DNA (1.3 µg/µl) 5 µl * Agilent 10x blocking agent 11 µl * Agilent 2x Hybridization buffer 55 µl Total110 µl

steps.title: Mix sample by pipetting, by careful...
steps.instruction: Mix sample by pipetting, by careful not to create any bubbles.

steps.title: Spin down with maximum speed for a few seconds
steps.instruction: Spin down with maximum speed for a few seconds.

steps.title: Heat for 00:03:00 at 95 °C...
steps.instruction: Heat for 00:03:00 at 95 °C and incubate immediately thereafter for 00:30:00 at 37 °C .

steps.title: Leave samples in heat block, spin...
steps.instruction: Leave samples in heat block, spin down for 00:01:00 at maximum speed.

steps.title: Load gasket slide in hybridization chamber...
steps.instruction: Load gasket slide in hybridization chamber and dispense 100 µl hyb mix in a drag and drop manner (use a 200 µl pipette, be careful not to create any bubbles)

steps.title: Place microarray slide – active side...
steps.instruction: Place microarray slide – active side down – and assemble chamber.

steps.title: Check for immobile air bubbles by...
steps.instruction: Check for immobile air bubbles by rotating the assembled hybridization chamber. If necessary, slam side of the chamber on table to loosen the air bubbles.

steps.title: Place assembled chamber in the hybridization...
steps.instruction: Place assembled chamber in the hybridization oven ( 65 °C at 20 rpm) and make sure to balance with empty chambers.

steps.title: Hybridize for 24:00:00 , 65 °C at 20 rpm
steps.instruction: Hybridize for 24:00:00 , 65 °C at 20 rpm.

steps.title: Turn on Agilent Slide Scanner
steps.instruction: Turn on Agilent Slide Scanner

steps.title: Wash buffer dishes with distilled water...
steps.instruction: Wash buffer dishes with distilled water and blow dry with pressurized air.

steps.title: Separate gasket slide from microarray slide...
steps.instruction: Separate gasket slide from microarray slide in dish #1 (buffer 1)

steps.title: Place slides in holding rack and...
steps.instruction: Place slides in holding rack and was in dish #2 for 00:05:00 , rotation of stirrer is switched ON!

steps.title: Start the " Scan Control Software"...
steps.instruction: Start the " Scan Control Software" For Agilent 180k, select the “AgilentG3_CGH” Option

steps.title: Click on “Set Values” to confirm all settings
steps.instruction: Click on “Set Values” to confirm all settings

steps.title: Move holding rack to dish #3...
steps.instruction: Move holding rack to dish #3 (buffer 2) and wash for 00:01:00 , rotation of stirrer and heating is switched ON!

steps.title: Move holding rack to dish #4 (acetonitrile) leave for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Move holding rack to dish #4 (acetonitrile) leave for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Remove slide gently with tweezers, thus...
steps.instruction: Remove slide gently with tweezers, thus preventing the formation of droplets.

steps.title: Place slide in holder and load...
steps.instruction: Place slide in holder and load into the carousel of the scanner Agilent Slide Scanner scans through the back of the slide (this side must contain the numeric barcode)

steps.title: Open “feature extraction” and check TIFF file
steps.instruction: Open “feature extraction” and check TIFF file

steps.title: Click Scan Slot m-n on the...
steps.instruction: Click Scan Slot m-n on the Scan Control main window The letter m represents the Start slot where your first slide is located, and the letter n represents the End slot where your last slide is located.
